name: Iron Field Boots [T]
description: Terran infantry boots built for the Hive's lower levels â€” iron-reinforced toe caps, chemical-resistant sole compound, ankle brace built in. Heavy. Loud on metal grating, which is everything in the Hive. You learn to walk differently in them, heel-first instead of toe-first, redistributing weight so the grating doesn't ring. Every Terran soldier develops this walk. You can identify a long-service soldier by it in civilian clothes, six years after discharge, still walking like they're trying not to wake the Hive.
